notifications.registerSuccess: Account created successfully! Welcome to San Sieu Toc.

about.heroSubtitle: Vietnam's leading sports field booking platform, connecting millions of sports enthusiasts with the best quality venues.
about.missionText1: San Sieu Toc was founded with the goal of simplifying the process of finding and booking sports fields. We believe everyone deserves the opportunity to play sports easily and conveniently.
about.missionText2: With advanced technology and a wide partner network, we are committed to delivering a fast, transparent, and reliable booking experience for all users.
about.whyChooseDesc: We are more than just a booking platform — we are your trusted partner in every game.
about.feature1Desc: Book your field in under 30 seconds. No phone calls, no waiting — just pick and play.
about.feature2Desc: Every field is reviewed and rated by real players, so you always know what to expect.
about.feature3Desc: Intuitive interface designed for everyone, even if you're not tech-savvy.
about.feature4Desc: Our support team is always available to help you with any questions or issues.
about.meetTheTeam: Meet the people behind San Sieu Toc
about.ctaText: Join hundreds of thousands of users who trust San Sieu Toc.

teamMembers.name: Nguyễn Viết Sang
teamMembers.description: Over 10 years of experience in sports and technology.

teamMembers.name: Phan Duy Thành
teamMembers.description: A technology specialist passionate about building digital products.

teamMembers.name: Hoàng Tuấn Long
teamMembers.description: Ensures smooth nationwide operations for the platform.

milestoneItems.event: San Sieu Toc launched with the first 50 partner fields
Expanded to 10 provinces and reached 10,000 users
Released the mobile app and surpassed 500 partner fields
Reached 50,000 users and expanded to 30 provinces
Integrated online payments and reached 100,000+ users
Became Vietnam’s #1 sports field booking platform

home.heroSubtitle: Book football, badminton, tennis courts instantly. Smart search system, book easily in just 30 seconds.
home.noFieldsFound: No fields found in this category
home.howItWorksTitle: Book a field in just 3 simple steps
home.howItWorksDesc: Just 3 simple steps to book your favorite field
home.step1Desc: Find a field that fits your location and time
home.step2Desc: Select a time slot and confirm your booking online
home.step3Desc: Come to the field and enjoy your game
home.ourStoryP1: Every great match starts with finding the right field. But for many, that process is frustrating — calling around, uncertain availability, wasting time.
home.ourStoryP2: In 2024, our team of developers and sports enthusiasts came together with a simple question: "What if booking a sports field was as easy as ordering food online?"
home.ourStoryP3: Today, Sân Siêu Tốc has helped over 10,000 players find and book their perfect field — from casual weekend kickabouts to competitive tournaments.

fieldList.pageSubtitle: Find and book the perfect sports field for you
fieldList.emptyDescription: Try changing filters or search with different keywords

notFound.sub: The URL you accessed is invalid or has been removed.

terms.contactNote: If you have any questions about these policies, please contact us via hotline

general.intro: Welcome to San Sieu Toc. By accessing and using our services, you agree to comply with the terms and conditions described here.
bullets: Our services are intended for individuals aged 15 and above.
Users are responsible for keeping their account credentials secure.
San Sieu Toc may update these terms at any time without prior notice.

bookingPolicy.intro: To ensure fairness for all players and field owners, the booking process is governed by the following rules:
processBullets: Select a field and time slot, then complete the deposit payment (if applicable).
A booking is only confirmed once you receive a "Success" notification via the app/email.
Each account may book up to 3 fields within the same time slot.
bookingPolicy.responsibilityText: Please arrive at least 10 minutes before the start time. If you are more than 15 minutes late without notifying the owner, the owner may re-rent the slot to someone else.

refund.intro: San Sieu Toc supports multiple payment methods—from e-wallets to bank transfers—for maximum convenience.
refund.note: Note: Force majeure such as natural disasters or owner-side technical issues will be reviewed for a full refund within 24–48 business hours.

security.intro: We are committed to protecting your personal data to the highest safety standards.
security.collectText: We collect information such as your name, phone number, email, and GPS location (with your permission) to recommend nearby fields.
useBullets: Confirm bookings and notify you of any changes.
Improve service quality and personalize your experience.
We do not share your information with third parties except for relevant field-operation partners.

community.intro: We aim to build a respectful sports community where fair play comes first:
bullets: Respect other players and on-site staff.
Keep shared areas clean; do not bring prohibited substances or dangerous items into the venue.
Do not use automation (bots) to unfairly compete for booking slots.

privacy.footerText: This policy is effective from February 01, 2026 and was last updated on February 04, 2026. We may change this policy at any time. Material changes will be communicated via email.

overview.p1: At San Sieu Toc, we are committed to protecting your privacy and personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your information when you use our sports field booking services.
overview.p2: By using the San Sieu Toc platform, you agree to the terms of this policy. If you do not agree, please stop using our services.

commitment.title: Our commitment
commitment.text: We strictly comply with Vietnam’s personal data protection regulations and international standards such as GDPR. Your data will NEVER be sold to third parties.

dataCollection.intro: We collect the following types of information:

personal.title: 1. Personal information
personal.intro: When you register an account or make a booking, we may collect:

automatic.title: 2. Automatically collected information
automatic.intro: When you use our website/app, we may automatically collect:

thirdParty.title: 3. Information from third parties
thirdParty.intro: If you sign in using social accounts (Google, Facebook), we may receive:

dataUsage.intro: We use your information for the following purposes:

improveExperience.title: Improve experience
items: Recommend suitable fields based on location and history
Analyze user behavior to optimize the UI

thirdPartySharing.title: Sharing with third parties
thirdPartySharing.text: We ONLY share data with: (1) field owners to confirm bookings, (2) payment partners (VNPay, Momo) to process transactions, (3) cloud service providers (AWS) for storage, and (4) competent authorities upon lawful request.

dataSecurity.intro: We apply industry-leading security measures to protect your data:

technical.title: Technical measures
items: SSL/TLS 256-bit encryption for all data in transit
AES-256 encryption for data at rest

accessControl.title: Access control
items: Only authorized staff may access data
All access is logged and monitored

incidentResponse.title: Incident response
incidentResponse.intro: In the event of a data breach, we will:
items: Explain the scope of the incident and impacted data
Provide guidance to help protect your account

userRights.intro: You have the following rights regarding your personal data:

cards.title: Right to access
cards.desc: Request to view the personal data we store about you.

cards.title: Right to rectification
cards.desc: Update or correct inaccurate personal information.

cards.title: Right to erasure
cards.desc: Request deletion of your personal data (except where legally required).

cards.title: Right to data portability
cards.desc: Download your data in JSON/CSV format.

cards.title: Right to object
cards.desc: Object to processing for marketing or profiling purposes.

cards.title: Right to complain
cards.desc: Submit a complaint to a data protection authority if needed.

userRights.contactText: To exercise these rights, please contact:

cookies.intro: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to improve your experience.

items.title: Essential cookies
items.desc: Enable core site functionality (login, cart). Cannot be disabled.

items.title: Functional cookies
items.desc: Remember preferences (language, theme). Can be disabled.

items.title: Analytics cookies
items.desc: Google Analytics to understand how you use the site. Can be disabled.

items.title: Marketing cookies
items.desc: Show relevant advertising. Can be disabled.

manage.title: Manage cookies
items: The "Cookie Settings" banner on the website

note.title: Note
note.text: Disabling cookies may affect your website experience (e.g., you may need to sign in again on each visit).

privacy.contactDesc: Our security team is always ready to assist you.
